fortune-500/oracle.summary: WARN Act window open. TechTimes June 1: sign-release-or-forfeit-severance phase reached. 14 workers allege remote classification to reduce WARN obligations. New Jersey state WARN (90-day notice) filed separately. Termination dates May 30-June 15. Composite 20.6 is 0.6pt above Critical band boundary.

countries/bolivia.summary: Fifth consecutive week of general strike. Military fully deployed under May 27 law. Four deaths confirmed. CNN May 29: protesters clash with police. No resolution. Economic crisis (energy production collapse, USD shortage) structural cause. IBTimes: darkest hour.

countries/israel.summary: HRW May 19: Israel curbs aid and kills civilians during ceasefire. UN Security Council May 2026: consolidate ceasefire, halt escalating violence. Aid volumes down 37% Q1 2026. 25 NGOs denied permit renewal. Authorized-resumption-with-systematic-denial pattern documented. Score floor at 0.

countries/hungary.summary: Constitutional confrontation: Sulyok refused to resign by May 31 deadline. Magyar confirmed constitutional amendment process June 1 (Bloomberg/WashPost/AlJazeera/Euronews). Amendment to remove Sulyok takes ~1 month. Venice Commission consulted by Sulyok. Most significant ACC governance event since Magyar became PM. ASSESSABLE NOW.

countries/democratic-republic-of-c.summary: Ebola (Bundibugyo strain, no approved vaccine): 282 confirmed cases, 42 deaths, 220 suspected as of June 1. WHO: catastrophic collision of disease and conflict. NPR May 31: aid cuts and misinformation hampering frontline response. 26.5M facing acute hunger. Contact tracing nearly impossible.

countries/iran.summary: Internet restored May 25 after 88-day shutdown. Amnesty: 39 political executions + 6,000+ arbitrary arrests since Feb 28 US-Israel attack. Death toll 6,488-36,500. 2025: 2,159 executions (80% of global total). OHCHR HRC resolution extended FFM mandates. Scale-floor methodology ruling pending at composite 2.5.

countries/sudan.summary: Entering lean season June-September with famine confirmed in El Fasher and Kadugli. 33.7M require assistance (globally highest). 19.5M acutely food insecure. 825,000 children under 5 expected severe acute malnutrition. 2026 plan only 16.2% funded. Civil war fourth year.

countries/afghanistan.summary: OHCHR Feb 2026: Taliban gender oppression and aid cuts pushing health system toward catastrophe. Women civil servants terminated without pay Jan 2026. Amnesty March 2026: new criminal regulation targets women with harsher punishments. Decree removes equality before law and authorizes domestic violence. HRW April 2026: Taliban restrictions haunting Afghan women abroad.

countries/myanmar.summary: 3.6M displaced (record). HRW 2026: junta airstrikes kill civilians, destroy schools/churches/medical facilities. Amnesty Jan 2026: junta atrocities surge 5 years since coup. Jet fuel on ghost ships linked to Iran. 12M face acute hunger. 982 civilians killed by airstrikes in 2025 (53% YoY increase). 16M require lifesaving assistance in 2026.

countries/haiti.summary: UN Gang Suppression Force: 400 Chadian troops deployed April 1 (first of 1,500). 5.8M (52%) face crisis-level food insecurity. 1,243 killed in 141 drone operations March 2025-January 2026 including 17 children. Sexual violence escalating. Security Council considering conversion to full UN peacekeeping operation.
